steps.action: Sync alpha-skill and beta-skill into the remote repo sandbox on shuvtest
steps.expected: Both skill directories exist in the remote repo sandbox
Returns all skill directories in the repository

steps.action: Activate alpha-skill and leave beta-skill inactive
steps.expected: alpha-skill is active and beta-skill remains inactive
Status fields align with symlink presence in the active dir

assertions.title: Transfer Skill Directory to Remote Host

steps.action: Call SkillOps.syncSkill for alpha-skill and beta-skill
steps.expected: Skill files transfer to shuvtest with structure and permissions preserved
Remote tree matches source tree including executable run.sh permissions
steps.observed: local run.sh mode=755, remote run.sh mode=755

steps.action: Call SkillOps.verifySync for alpha-skill and beta-skill
steps.expected: All file checksums match between local and remote sandboxes
No mismatched files remain after sync
A symlink is created in the active-dir sandbox pointing to the remote skill path

steps.action: Verify the active-dir entry on shuvtest
steps.expected: readlink resolves to the synced alpha-skill directory
The active-dir symlink is removed without deleting the skill repo files

steps.action: Verify active-dir and repo path on shuvtest
steps.expected: Symlink is absent and the synced repo directory still exists
steps.observed:
LINK_ABSENT
REPO_DIR_PRESENT
total 8
drwxr-xr-x 2 exedev exedev 4096 Mar 15 13:56 .
drwxr-xr-x 4 exedev exedev 4096 Mar 15 13:47 ..

assertions.title: Compare HEAD Commits Across Hosts

steps.action: Create a new localhost commit in the drift sandbox, push to origin, and fetch on shuvtest without merging
steps.expected: localhost and shuvtest have different HEAD commits referencing the same origin history

steps.action: Call SkillOps.checkDrift with localhost as the reference host
steps.expected: Report includes per-host HEAD SHAs for localhost and shuvtest
steps.observed:
{"name":"(FiberFailure) DriftCheckFailed","message":"Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).
","stack":"DriftCheckFailed: Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).

    at Object.onFailure (file:///home/shuv/repos/shuvdex/packages/skill-ops/dist/live.js:456:125)
    at file:///home/shuv/repos/shuvdex/node_modules/effect/dist/esm/internal/core.js:453:22
    at file:///home/shuv/repos/shuvdex/node_modules/effect/dist/esm/internal/fiberRuntime.js:983:46
    at skill.checkDrift (file:///home/shuv/repos/shuvdex/packages/telemetry/dist/span.js:38:20)"}

assertions.issues: checkDrift did not return the expected cross-host HEAD comparison. Error: Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).

assertions.title: Identify Drifted Hosts with Details

steps.action: Inspect the drift report for the shuvtest host
steps.expected: shuvtest is marked drifted with direction and ahead/behind counts
steps.observed:
{"name":"(FiberFailure) DriftCheckFailed","message":"Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).
","stack":"DriftCheckFailed: Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).

steps.action: Directly verify rev-list counts on shuvtest
steps.expected: git rev-list --left-right --count referenceSha...HEAD shows behind=1 ahead=0
steps.observed:
## main...origin/main [behind 1]

LOG

6026684 initial commit

COUNTS
1	0

assertions.issues: Drift report did not expose the expected direction and ahead/behind counts. Error: Drift check failed: could not get reference HEAD from localhost: ConnectionFailed: SSH connection failed to localhost: shuv@localhost: Permission denied (publickey,password).

frictions.description: SSH commands against shuvtest emitted the known post-quantum warning on stderr ("connection is not using a post-quantum key exchange algorithm").
frictions.resolution: Accepted the known benign warning and validated outcomes from command exit codes/stdout.
